title: NEET-UG paper leak: CBI arrests Latur coaching institute owner
description: On May 17, the CBI conducted searches at the main office of Renukai Chemistry Classes (RCC) in Maharashtra’s Latur city; accused Shivaraj Motegaonkar is said to be close to chemistry lecturer P.V. Kulkarni, who is associated with the National Testing Agency (NTA) and was earlier arrested by the CBI
